meta.title: Records & data protection — authority support
meta.description: Support for analysing and managing records containing personal data in line with the GDPR.
home.title: Analysis and management of records with sensitive personal data
home.body: Structure disclosure decisions for public records, document assessments under the GDPR, and get traceability in your process. This tool is not legal advice; your organisation is always responsible for the assessment.
home.bullet2: Text extraction and notes for confidentiality / proportionality
home.bullet3: Audit log of actions per organisation
home.bullet4: Billing: one-off or annual (self-serve or contract)
login.title: Sign in
login.intro: Sign in with email and password.
login.verified: Your email is confirmed. You can sign in now.
login.noTenant: Your account has no organisation membership. Contact an administrator.
login.expiredToken: The confirmation link has expired. Register again with the same email to receive a new message.
login.invalidToken: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired. Register again or request a new email.
login.unverified: Confirm your email using the link in the message before signing in. Register again with the same address if you need a new email.
register.title: Create account
register.intro: Register with email. You must confirm your address using the link in the message before you can sign in. If you do not receive mail, check spam or register again with the same address to resend the link.
register.orgHint: Used as the organisation name in the app.
register.err409: This email is already registered and verified.
register.errValidation: Check that email and password (at least 8 characters) are filled in correctly.
register.err503: Could not send confirmation email. Try again later.
register.success: We have sent an email with a confirmation link. Check your inbox and spam folder.
verify.title: Confirm email
verify.intro: Click the button below to finish registration.
dashboard.footer: The tool provides structure and traceability; your organisation is always responsible for legal assessment and disclosure decisions.
dashboardHome.title: Overview
dashboardHome.intro: Work with cases, upload records, and document assessments. All access is logged per organisation.
cases.title: Cases
cases.intro: Link records to a case and diary reference. Create a new case if you have permission.
upload.title: Upload record
document.latestHint: Each row matches the same number as [N] in the extracted text below. Under “Highlighted text” you see exactly the passage the model referred to.
document.extractedHint: Highlights with [N] match the item with the same number in the list above. When overlaps occur, the highest risk is shown; others remain as quotes in the list.
document.noText: No text could be extracted (this type may not be supported yet).
document.notesIntro: Document reasons, balancing of interests, and any disclosure decisions according to your internal process.
analysis.title: Automatic AI analysis
analysis.body: Starts a new run against OpenAI. The result is a suggestion — always check against the original. Personal data is sent to OpenAI; ensure internal approval and a DPA.
finding.overlapNote: The passage is shown as a quote above; in the text it is hidden by an overlapping higher-risk highlight.
notes.placeholder: E.g. disclosure assessment under your public records act / complementary confidentiality, proportionality under the GDPR …
logout.label: Sign out
email.verify.subject: Confirm your email address
email.verify.htmlLink: Click here to confirm your email address
email.verify.htmlIgnore: If you did not create an account, you can ignore this message.
email.errAuthUrl: AUTH_URL is missing or points to a local address. Set AUTH_URL to your public HTTPS URL (e.g. https://gdpr.example.com).
email.errNotConfigured: Email is not configured. Set RESEND_API_KEY and EMAIL_FROM on the server, or temporarily ALLOW_EMAIL_LOG_FALLBACK=true (link is logged — see systemd/journal).
email.errSendFailed: Could not send email right now.
